problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
hypothesis: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Quantum. Quantum tunneling through energy barrier directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
